sensoryRooms.features: Dimmed lighting, noise-canceling headphones, tactile panels, comfortable seating

serviceAnimalAreas.features: Relief turf, trash bin, waste bags, water bowl

accessibilityDesk: Guest Services Booths at Sections 104, 124, 208, 224, 308, 324. Assisted listening devices and sensory bags (headphones, fidget toys) can be checked out here free of charge.
